data.title: 25K+ enroll in UMD Smith AI course for career growth - free online certification on AI.
data.description: In College Park, Maryland, a free online certificate course on artificial intelligence for career advancement from the University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business has attracted over 25,000 participants globally. The course, "Artificial Intelligence and Career Development," offers valuable insights and training in this futuristic technology.

data.title: William F. Buckley Jr. will be honored with a stamp by the US Postal Service at Yale University.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, the U.S. Postal Service announced the dedication of a new stamp at Yale University to honor William F. Buckley Jr. Buckley was known for his significant contributions to American conservatism as a writer, political commentator, and novelist. The stamp commemorates his legacy and impact on modern American political thought. This initiative is part of a series of recognitions by the Postal Service for influential figures in American history.

data.title: Jeremy Zahn aids Native American tribes as federal programs dwindle, securing grants for their future.
data.description: Jeremy Zahn, a grant writer for Native American tribes, is assisting tribal communities as they face the disappearance of federal programs. In the United States, numerous tribal communities are at risk of collapse without essential grants. Zahn's efforts are crucial in securing a future for these communities. This support is especially vital as federal programs dwindle, putting at risk the survival of many tribal groups. Zahn's work highlights the critical role that grants play in sustaining Native American communities, with the future of these tribes heavily relying on securing necessary funding.

data.title: Ukraine to consider crypto market regulations in August, momentum for bill started in 2024.
data.description: Ukraine has experienced various regulatory challenges in the crypto space, but there has been progress towards a regulatory bill since 2024. The momentum for this bill is gaining traction, indicating a shift towards clearer regulations in the industry.

data.title: Iamgold Corp (NYSE: IAG) reports Q2 earnings call transcript, achieving production of 173,000oz, aiming for 735-820,000oz production with cost guidance at $1,830-$1,930/oz. Cash and cash equivalents stand at $223.8M, with net debt at $1B and liquidity at $616.5M. Industry focuses on maximizing throughput and operational efficiency.
data.description: Iamgold Corp (NYSE: IAG) reported its second-quarter financial results, with revenue from continuing operations totaling $580.9 million from sales of 182,000 ounces at an average realized price of $3,182 per ounce. The company produced 173,000 ounces of gold in the quarter and had quarterly cash costs of $1,556 per ounce and all-in sustaining costs of $2,041 per ounce. They aim to achieve a production target of 735-820,000 ounces of gold at a cost range of $1,830-$1,930 per ounce for the year. Iamgold had 223.8 million in cash and cash equivalents and net debt of 1 billion at the end of the quarter. The company has made progress in ramping up the Cote Gold mine and plans to announce an updated Cote mine life of mine next year. They also highlighted their focus on responsible mining practices and safety along with their efforts to delever the balance sheet and prioritize debt repayment.

data.title: US dollar money supply grew 3.87% in Q2 2025, while the Dollar Index dropped 7.03%. Global M2 increased due to dollar depreciation. Domestic M2 hit record $22 trillion, with a 4.5% YoY growth. Fed hasn't cut rates despite this significant growth.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, the U.S. dollar-denominated money supply increased by 3.87%, reaching a record $22 trillion. The U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a significant decline of 7.03%, one of the steepest quarterly drops in recent history. This decline had a notable impact on global M2 measurements when calculated in dollars, causing a substantial increase even with modest growth in local currency M2. However, when assessed at constant exchange rates, global M2 only showed a modest rise of 1.19%. Despite the Federal Reserve maintaining interest rates and reducing its balance sheet, the M2 money supply's year-over-year growth of 4.5% surpassed the previous peak of $21.86 trillion reached in March 2022. This growth, although slightly below the long-term average, signifies a significant increase amidst the ongoing monetary policy landscape.

data.title: SMArtX Advisory Solutions adds 16 new strategies from 2 firms, Fort Washington Investment Advisors and Tannin Capital.
data.description: In an exciting development, SMArtX Advisory Solutions, a renowned innovator in managed accounts technology, has recently expanded its platform by welcoming Fort Washington Investment Advisors and Tannin Capital. The addition of these two esteemed firms brings a total of 16 new strategies to the SMArtX platform. This move underscores SMArtX's commitment to providing a diverse range of investment options for its clientele. This expansion is anticipated to enhance the platform's offerings and further solidifies SMArtX's position as a leader in the industry. The announcement was made on August 8, 2025 from West Palm Beach, Florida, where SMArtX is headquartered.

data.title: Crocs beats Q2 earnings estimates with $4.23 EPS and $1.14B sales. Reports 3.4% revenue rise. Initiating $50M cost savings. Q3 sales expected between $945.18M and $966.42M, down approx 9-11%. Operating environment uncertain.
data.description: Crocs, Inc. reported its second-quarter adjusted earnings per share at $4.23, surpassing the consensus estimate of $4.01. Sales were reported at $1.14 billion, in line with estimates. The company credited its Crocs and HEYDUDE brands for the strong performance, achieving its highest-ever quarterly gross profit. Revenue increased by 3.4%, driven by a 5% growth in the Crocs brand and a 7.6% rise in direct-to-consumer sales for HEYDUDE. However, the operating environment was deemed uncertain, leading to reduced inventory receipts and promotional activity to protect brand health. $50 million in cost savings were implemented to support long-term margin growth and cash flow. Moving forward, the company forecasts third-quarter sales between $945.18 million and $966.42 million, down approximately 11% to 9% compared to the previous quarter.

data.title: Dark Horse CPAs hires Joseph Kinney as Principal Accelerator, establishes SMB Fractional CFO & Accounting Practice in Albuquerque.
data.description: In Cardiff By The Sea, California on August 8, 2025, Dark Horse CPAs, a leading accounting and tax firm catering to small businesses and individuals, disclosed the recruitment of Joseph Kinney, CPA, as a Principal Accelerator in its cutting-edge Principal Accelerator Program.

data.title: Longeveron announces public offering worth up to $17.5 million.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 6% in 2021, following a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The recovery is expected to be uneven among countries, with advanced economies growing by 5.4% and emerging market and developing economies by 6.7%. Inflation rates are also predicted to increase globally to 3.8%. However, uncertainties remain, including the uneven distribution of vaccines and the possibility of new virus variants. The report also highlighted the importance of policy support and structural reforms to ensure a sustainable and inclusive recovery.

data.title: Genmab and AbbVie's combination drug cuts risk of disease progression by 79% in Phase 3 trial for follicular lymphoma.
data.description: Genmab A/S announced positive outcomes from the Phase 3 EPCORE FL-1 trial of subcutaneous epcoritamab in combination with rituximab and lenalidomide for adults with relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma. The study achieved its main goals of overall response rate (ORR) and progression-free survival (PFS), showing significant differences in both endpoints. The treatment reduced the risk of disease progression or death by 79%. Genmab is collaborating with AbbVie Inc. on the drug's development. The findings, based on an interim analysis, will be presented at the 67th ASH meeting and used for global regulatory submissions.
